name: Salesforce, Inc.

profile.description: Salesforce is the world's #1 CRM platform, providing cloud-based customer relationship management, enterprise applications, and the Agentforce AI platform. FY2026 revenue of $41.5B (up 10%) with Agentforce ARR at $800M growing 169% YoY.

innovation.label: STRONG
innovation.analysis: Scored 9/10 based on track record, AI deployment, market position, pipeline visibility, and R&D intensity. See yfinance data and web research for evidence [1].

inspiration.label: STRONG
inspiration.analysis: Scored 7/10 based on mission quality, community impact, employee retention, and insider buying signals [1].

infrastructure.label: STRONG
infrastructure.analysis: Mechanically scored on available metrics. Liquidity passes ($2,437,277,342 daily) [1].

ai_resilience.label: MODERATE
ai_resilience.analysis: AI Risk Protection (5/9) + AI Opportunity (1/1) = 6/10. Scored based on business model's structural exposure or immunity to AI disruption [1].

infinite_game.summary: Scored 8/10 using 3-2-2-2-1 weighted framework (Just Cause, Courage, Trust, Flexibility, Rivals).

investment_thesis: Salesforce, Inc. analysis based on current financial metrics and market positioning [1].
thesis_continued: Key risks and concerns for Salesforce, Inc. based on financial analysis [1].
